_comment: GovernanceAuditRecord — output of governance_audit_trail.ts after HUMAN DECISION.
_note: This record is immutable. It is written only after a human explicitly takes a governance action.
rationale: Deliberation reviewed. Supporting heuristics outweigh the cautioning one. Recovery_deficit failure mode is recurrent, not anomalous. Promoting candidate policy with intention to review after 5 additional audit cycles.
_immutability_note: This record is never overwritten. If the decision is later revised, a new GovernanceAuditRecord is created with action=rollback and a new policyVersionId.
